name: cracked-earring

name: infirmary-arrival
prompt: Wide shot academy infirmary interior. Silver-haired woman in uniform at doorway LEFT, entering. Medical bed center-right of room, supply cabinets along right wall. Clinical white walls, fluorescent lighting with cool blue undertones. Door open behind her. Late night quiet, sterile atmosphere. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, dramatic lighting, cool white blue color palette, high contrast, cel shading
